summary: This is a very brief personal update post rather than a substantive essay. Joel comments humorously on Seattle's weather culture, noting the irony of local newspapers treating rain as headline news in a city famous for rain. He also announces an upcoming Joel on Software community lunch meetup in Toronto.
key_points: Seattle newspapers treating rain as newsworthy strikes Joel as absurd given the city's rainy reputation
Joel organized in-person community meetups for his blog readers in various cities
The post reflects the casual, personal blogging style common in the mid-2000s
money_quotes: All the local newspapers are running big headlines about how it's raining. I don't get it!
key_insight: A minor personal update post with a quip about Seattle weather and a meetup announcement, containing no substantive technical or business content.
